title: Establish one release truth
outOfScope: Do not rewrite or delete the published v0.5.37 tag or its provider assets.
Do not consume the candidate source-commit lifecycle decision owned by the later lifecycle Work Item; preserve that boundary for revalidation.
Do not claim the plan or next release is complete before the new release workflow succeeds.

sources.reason: Canonical release state record to audit and enforce.
Plan status and impact correction required because Work Item 1 must precede final plan completion.

riskAssessment.reason: This Work Item changes only canonical validation, regression tests, and plan evidence; publication of the dependent next version is a separate Work Item.

executionDecision.reason: User clarified that Work Item 1 must be executed before the plan is considered complete and authorized the corresponding new release.

preReviewWarnings: Revalidate the already-published v0.5.37 evidence without rewriting it; a new release is required if canonical release truth changes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: release-state.json is the only canonical owner of release state, source identity, previous release, and evidence references; release.json and next-release.json are projections.
The consistency gate rejects canonical/projection conflicts, duplicate published/candidate identity, invalid state/evidence combinations, and digest drift with regression coverage.
The plan records that Work Item 1 was executed before final plan completion and records the impact/revalidation requirement for the next release.
Published v0.5.37 remains immutable and all required checks pass before the Work Item is archived.
guidelines: Keep canonical release truth separate from published and candidate projections.
Do not claim published or provider evidence without executable evidence.

intent.problem: The recalibration plan was closed before its first Work Item was executed, and release metadata must be explicitly verified as one canonical state source before issuing the corrective next version.
constraints: Preserve v0.5.37 tag, release assets, and archived evidence as immutable history.
Keep candidate source-commit lifecycle changes scoped to their later revalidation boundary.
Record the plan-order correction and downstream release impact as evidence, not as an unsupported completion claim.
intent.rationale: Executing One Release Truth now establishes the intended dependency order and lets the subsequent release be based on verified canonical state rather than a prematurely closed plan.

rawUserRequest: 工单1要执行；原意是在计划文档未完成前不要执行工单1，不是跳过工单1；现在补上工单1，评估对整个计划的影响，一起对应，然后再发版本。

declaredIntent.summary: Execute Work Item 1 after correcting the plan order, validate canonical release truth, and prepare the dependent next release.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Published and candidate projections remain distinct and agree with canonical release state.
Invalid state/evidence and metadata digest combinations fail closed.
Published v0.5.37 evidence is preserved while the next release is explicitly revalidated.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the budget repair required to complete the newly requested Work Item 1 and its verification suite.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
